center.name: 恩特雷里奥斯省
center.summary: 恩特雷里奥斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Pauraque、Mottle-cheeked tyrannulet、Yellow-billed tit-tyrant等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Hudson's canastero is found in the southeastern part of far southern Brazil's Rio Grande do Sul state, Uruguay, and in eastern Argentina from Santa Fe and Entre Ríos provinces south to Buenos Aires Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found from Minas Gerais state in southeastern Brazil southwest through Mato Grosso do Sul into eastern Paraguay and south throughout Uruguay and northeastern Argentina as far as Entre Ríos Province. In the Andes the mottle-cheeked tyrannulet primarily inhabits montane evergreen forest and to a lesser extent higher ridgetop cloudforest and lower tropical forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: For example, it is not recorded to breed in Entre Ríos Province (Argentina) and it is scarce in Rio Grande do Sul (Brazil); about its presence in Uruguay likewise little is known, except that a population of some size is found along the Yaguarón River in the Cuchilla de Mangrullo region. thumb|left|The two pinkish eggs of the pauraque are laid directly on the ground or leaf litter.|alt=Two splotched pinkish eggs rest on dead leaves on the ground. It is found in open woodland/grassland habitats, but also scrubland and crop fields

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hellmayri, southwestern Paraguay's Ñeembucú Department and northern Argentina as far south as Entre Ríos Province The red-billed scythebill inhabits a wide variety of wooded landscapes, most of which are open to semi-open

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rusty-backed monjita is found in Argentina in an area roughly bounded by the provinces of Tucumán, Entre Ríos, and northeastern Santa Cruz.{{cite book | last =de la Peña | first =Martín R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Argentina, it occurs in Entre Ríos and the extreme north-east of Buenos Aires Provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Andes of Bolivia and western Argentina as far south as Chubut Province and east to Buenos Aires and Entre Ríos provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The curve-billed reedhaunter is found in the Brazilian state of Rio Grande do Sul, in southern Uruguay, and in eastern Argentina's Entre Ríos and Buenos Aires provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southwestern Venezuela; eastern Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru; central and eastern Bolivia; central and southern Brazil; Paraguay; Uruguay; and northern Argentina at least as far south as Entre Ríos Province. In addition it has been documented in the U.S
